avoid: Do not replace the main W @ X term with a custom full GEMM.
Do not use a U layout of [16,d] with leading dimension 16; use U as {d,16} with ldc=d.
Do not use SGEMM2 with m=16,n=d or SGEMM3 with transposed op flags unless the full row-major/column-major mapping is proven correct.
Do not hardcode hidden dimensions or specialize only for one d value.
Do not pursue result caching; this benchmark does not establish repeated identical inputs as a valid workload.
evidence: Correctness passes for all tested d values: 3584, 4096, and 4608.
Speedup is positive but small and uniform: 1.036x at d=3584, 1.029x at d=4096, 1.029x at d=4608, aggregate 1.031x.
Latency remains dominated by the large d x d main multiplication; the custom rank-16 scalar update appears to provide only a modest reduction versus the Torch baseline.
Profile labels the bottleneck as rank16_update_or_memory_bandwidth, consistent with a scalar custom low-rank path that may be memory-bound.
Compile succeeded and static review found no issues, but compile time was high at 226 seconds for only a modest runtime gain.

recommended_actions: try float4 stores when d is divisible by 4
fall back to ATen if numerical error appears
Validate a pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM implementation before further tuning the handwritten rank-16 update.
Use the exact qyh-style cuBLAS mapping: SGEMM1 with opA=N, opB=N, A=X, B=W, m=d, n=d, k=d, beta=0 to produce Y.
Compute the low-rank intermediate with SGEMM2 using opA=N, opB=T, A=X, B=B, m=d, n=16, k=d, storing U with shape {d,16} and ldc=d; avoid explicit B.T materialization.
Accumulate the low-rank term with SGEMM3 using opA=N, opB=N, A=U, B=A, m=d, n=d, k=16, beta=1 so the result is added directly into Y.
If keeping this candidate as a baseline, compare it directly against the pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM version using the same benchmark settings and more iterations to confirm the 3 percent gain is stable.
If a custom low-rank path is retained, focus only on the rank-16 update path, not the full W @ X GEMM; the main term should remain direct cuBLAS SGEMM.
